resources.string: Your PDFs stay on this device
Choose a PDF to open it privately. QuietPDF does not upload your documents.
QuietPDF no longer has permission to open this file. Choose it again.
This PDF is no longer available. Check that it has not been moved or deleted.
This file is not a readable PDF. It may be damaged or incomplete.
This PDF is password-protected. Password entry is not available yet.
This PDF uses a format that this device cannot open.
This PDF does not contain any pages.
Page %1$d is unavailable because file access was lost. Open the PDF again.
Page %1$d needs more memory than is currently available. Close other apps and retry.
This PDF has no searchable text
This PDF does not contain a table of contents.
Couldn’t read this PDF’s table of contents.
Page %1$d could not be read. Keep the original file and try another PDF tool.
File access was lost. Open the PDF again to check it.
QuietPDF couldn’t complete this check. Keep the original file and try opening it again.
One of the selected images could not be read. Choose supported images and try again.
QuietPDF lost access to an image or the save location. Choose the images again.
These images need more memory than is available. Close other apps or choose smaller images.
The PDF could not be saved. Choose another location and try again.
Choose how %1$d images will be placed.
Pages will be added in this document order.
Select at least two different PDFs to merge.
One selected file is not a readable PDF. Keep the originals and choose the files again.
QuietPDF lost access to a selected PDF or save location. Choose the files again.
These PDFs need more memory than is available. Close other apps and try again.
The merged PDF could not be created safely. Keep the originals and choose another save location.
Create one PDF for every page.
Cover pages 1–%1$d in order, for example: 1-3, 4-%1$d
Created %1$d PDFs in the selected folder.
Choose a PDF with at least two pages to split.
This file is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose another file.
Use at least two ranges that cover every page once, in order.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or output folder. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps and try again.
The split PDFs could not be created safely. Keep the original and choose another folder.
%1$s contains %2$d pages. Choose pages for one new PDF.
Use page numbers and ranges from 1 to %1$d, for example: 1, 3, 5-7
This file is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose another file.
Enter unique pages in their original order, within this PDF’s page range.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
These pages need more memory than is available. Close other apps or select fewer pages.
The extracted PDF could not be created safely. Keep the original and choose another save location.
%1$s contains %2$d pages. A new PDF will be created; the original will not change.
Use page numbers and ranges from 1 to %1$d, for example: 2, 4-6
Choose a PDF with at least two pages. A PDF must retain at least one page.
This file is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose another file.
Choose unique pages in order and leave at least one page in the new PDF.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The new PDF could not be created safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
Move the pages in %1$s into the order you want. Every page will remain in the new PDF.
Choose a PDF with at least two pages to rearrange.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
The page order must contain every page exactly once. Reset the order and try again.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The rearranged PDF could not be created safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
%1$s contains %2$d pages. A new PDF will be created; the original will not change.
Use page numbers and ranges from 1 to %1$d, for example: 1, 3, 5-7
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
Choose unique pages in their original order, within this PDF’s page range.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The rotated PDF could not be created safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
Duplicating %1$d selected pages; the new PDF will contain %2$d pages…
%1$s contains %2$d pages. Each selected page will be copied immediately after its original in a new PDF.
Use page numbers and ranges from 1 to %1$d, for example: 1, 3, 5-7
%1$d pages selected. The new PDF will contain %2$d pages.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
Choose unique pages in their original order, within this PDF’s page range.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or select fewer pages.
The duplicated-page PDF could not be created safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
%1$s contains %2$d pages. Choose how strongly to compress eligible images.
Enter a size smaller than the original (minimum 0.01 MB).
Best effort: QuietPDF will measure progressively stronger compression levels and stop when the target is reached. Some PDFs cannot reach the requested size safely.

Eligible opaque images on image-only pages will be resized and converted to JPEG. Pages containing text and transparent images remain unchanged to protect document integrity. Text, vectors, annotations, page sizes and rotation are preserved.
No safely compressible image-only pages were found. QuietPDF will not claim savings or create a larger replacement.
Target reached: %1$s → %2$s for a %3$s target (%4$d%% smaller).
Best safe result: %1$s → %2$s (%4$d%% smaller). The %3$s target could not be reached within safe quality limits.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
This PDF is already efficiently encoded for the selected mode. No larger replacement was saved.
Enter a target from 0.01 MB up to, but not including, the original size.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The compressed PDF could not be created and validated safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
Crop and appearance settings are stored separately for every captured page.
Document edges were detected automatically. Drag any corner to correct them before saving.
Document edges were not clear. Position all four corners manually before saving.
Even out uneven lighting across the page.
Perspective-corrected document with the selected appearance
Processing every page and validating the scanned PDF…
All captured pages were saved in order as a validated PDF.
Camera access is required to scan. Allow Camera permission in Android settings, then try again.
No usable back camera is available. Close other camera apps and try again.
The photo could not be captured. Keep the document steady and try again.
The camera returned an unreadable or empty photo. Retake the document.
The crop corners do not form a usable document. Move the corners apart and try saving again.
The appearance preview could not be updated. Try a different mode or save with the current settings.
The captured photo needs more memory than is available. Close other apps and retake it.
The scanned PDF could not be created and validated. The captured photo is still available to retry.
QuietPDF lost access to the save location. Choose another location; the captured photo is still available.
Use at least %1$d characters. Passwords are not stored and cannot be recovered.
The saved copy will require this password to open and uses standards-based AES-256 PDF encryption. The original PDF is not changed.
Checking whether this PDF can be protected…
Protected and validated %1$d pages. Keep the password safe—it cannot be recovered.
This PDF already requires a password. Use Change password instead when that feature is available.
This file changed or is not a readable, unprotected PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
Use a password of at least 6 characters that is not only spaces.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The protected PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
The password is used only on this device and is not stored.
That password is incorrect. Try again.
A new copy that opens without a password will be saved. The protected original is not changed.
Checking whether this PDF is password protected…
Removing protection and validating the saved copy…
Password removed and %1$d pages validated. The protected original was not changed.
This PDF does not have password protection to remove.
This file changed or is not a readable protected PDF. Choose the original again.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The unlocked PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The protected original was not changed; choose another save location.
Enter the current and new passwords for %1$s.
The current password is incorrect. Try again.
The new password must be different from the current password.
A new AES-256 protected copy will be saved. The original and both passwords are not stored.
Checking whether this PDF is password protected…
Changing the password and validating the saved copy…
Password changed and %1$d pages validated. Keep the new password safe—it cannot be recovered.
This PDF does not have a password to change. Use Protect PDF instead.
Use a different new password of at least 6 characters that is not only spaces.
This file changed or is not a readable protected PDF. Choose the original again.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The newly protected PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
Enter up to %1$d characters. Nothing is added automatically.
Leave blank for all pages, or enter pages and ranges such as 1, 3-5. This PDF has %1$d pages.
Enter valid pages and ranges within this PDF.
PDF page with the configured text watermark
Enter watermark text and a valid page selection to generate an accurate preview.
Checking this PDF and preparing watermark options…
Applying the watermark to %1$d selected pages and validating the copy…
Watermarked %1$d of %2$d pages and validated the saved copy.
This PDF is password protected. Remove its password first, then add the watermark.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
Enter watermark text, valid pages, and supported appearance settings.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This PDF needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The watermarked PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
%1$s · %2$d pages. Choose a PNG, JPEG, or other supported image. Transparent pixels are preserved.
Leave blank for all pages, or enter pages and ranges such as 1, 3-5. This PDF has %1$d pages.
Enter valid pages and ranges within this PDF.
PDF page with the configured image watermark
Choose valid pages to generate an accurate preview.
Checking this PDF before image watermarking…
Checking and safely decoding the watermark image…
Applying the image watermark to %1$d selected pages and validating the copy…
Image-watermarked %1$d of %2$d pages and validated the saved copy.
This PDF is password protected. Remove its password first, then add the watermark.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
This image could not be decoded safely. Choose a valid PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, HEIF, or BMP image.
Choose valid pages and supported appearance settings.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF, image, or save location. Choose them again.
The PDF or image needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or choose a smaller image.
The image-watermarked PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
Too large or unsupported to extract safely
Preparing %1$d images for the Android Sharesheet…
Saved and validated a ZIP containing %1$d extracted images.
This PDF contains no embedded image objects. Page screenshots are not reported as extracted images.
This PDF is password protected. Remove its password first, then extract images.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF. Keep the original and choose it again.
Select at least one image that can be extracted safely.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or output location. Choose them again.
The PDF contains images that need more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The extracted images could not be created and reopened safely. Try another output location.
The selected images could not be prepared safely for sharing. Try a smaller selection.
%1$d unsupported fields are shown unchanged and will not be edited.
Checking this PDF for supported AcroForm fields…
Writing %1$d form values and validating the saved copy…
Saved %1$d form values across %2$d pages and validated the copy.
This PDF does not contain an AcroForm to fill.
This form uses XFA or only unsupported field types. QuietPDF will not fake form filling with visual overlays.
This PDF is password protected. Remove its password first, then fill the form.
This file changed or is not a readable PDF form. Keep the original and choose it again.
Complete all required fields and use values supported by the form.
QuietPDF lost access to the PDF or save location. Choose them again.
This form needs more memory than is available. Close other apps or try a smaller PDF.
The filled PDF could not be created and reopened safely. The original was not changed; choose another save location.
